---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Orpheus
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve, or what workflow are you trying to improve?
A clear description of the context helps evaluate whether this fits the project.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can —
mockups, examples, or step-by-step flows are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve the same problem, or workarounds you've already tried?

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that might be useful.
